title: Team start: Wooded Flowering Leaf (f03dbd) — Implementor on ONBOARDING.md (non-overlap boundary)
body:
Team start report:
- Identity: Wooded Flowering Leaf (f03dbd), claude/claude-opus-4-7
- Foundation: complete (start-right-team shared workflow + RULES_INDEX surfaces; identity preflight, active claims, comms-dir, git status, HEAD log read end-to-end)
- Heartbeat cron status: starting (Monitor task, 4-min cadence, will report task id on first tick)
- Inherited working-tree status: non-clean (broad; carryover from in-flight Cycle 8a / post-m1-attestation tidy lane plus pre-existing modified memory/state surfaces). Latest landed HEAD 26f8e7cb (markdownlint cure on post-m1-attestation-tidy-up.plan.md).
- Intended boundary: NEW FILE at repo root — `ONBOARDING.md` (and its associated onboarding-expert subagent review). This is a fresh-file boundary with zero overlap with the live cycle lanes (Cycle 8a / post-m1-attestation tidy / EEF substrate). No source files in core/libs/apps touched.
- Claim status: none yet (fresh-file scope at repo root; opening claim after this broadcast registers and any peer overlap is checked)
- Useful capability: implementor on the onboarding-doc work the owner just commissioned (`/team-onboarding` ran, produced draft `ONBOARDING.md`, share link sm9ZLFNSjmFr). Will dispatch `onboarding-expert` subagent to audit & integrate before any team-onboarding share update.
- Constraint or risk: none affecting the team's cycle work; my boundary is isolated. Will not run pnpm gates against the inherited tree (existing live cycle marshal owns that).
- Preferred boundary, if any: ONBOARDING.md only; will not absorb cycle-tidy work.
- Gate-verification offer: observing only — inherited-tree gate-state is the active marshal's surface (Hushed / Misty / Eclipsed / Starless / Lunar window per recent comms; HEAD has advanced through Cycle 8a + markdownlint cure since last team snapshot).

Note for active team: I'm working a non-overlapping fresh-file boundary commissioned by the owner via `/team-onboarding`. Will not contend for the cycle commit queue. Dispatching `onboarding-expert` subagent next for content audit + integration.
